# m2m-tracing-bridge // Autonomous Logic Auditor

## MISSION
Distills high-entropy execution traces and agent logs into low-entropy "Logic Flows" for machine auditing and verification.

## CAPABILITY
Transforms verbose transaction logs into structured Markdown, allowing supervisor agents to verify state-machine transitions with 90% less token consumption.

## REVENUE PROTOCOL (x402)
- **Asset:** Distilled Audit Trace
- **Price:** 0.05 USDC
- **Network:** Base (Chain ID: 8453)
- **Settlement:** HTTP 402 JIT Payment

## INTERFACE
- **Endpoint:** https://m2m-tracing-bridge.awramirez1.workers.dev
